description: Ground truth patterns embedded in synthetic Tata car sales data. The CSV contains NO labels - only numbers and dates. These patterns exist for context agents to discover.
calibration_source: Real Tata Motors monthly sales Dec-24 to Dec-25 (publicly available)

patterns.name: Navratri + Diwali Surge
patterns.description: Peak car buying season in India. Auspicious period for major purchases.

patterns.name: Year-End Wholesale Push
patterns.description: Dealers push stock to meet annual sales targets.

patterns.name: Winter Wedding Season
patterns.description: Elevated car purchases during wedding season.

patterns.name: Summer Wedding Season + Akshaya Tritiya
patterns.description: Akshaya Tritiya is considered auspicious for buying vehicles.

patterns.name: Monsoon Demand Dip
patterns.description: Reduced showroom footfall during monsoon. Flood/waterlogging concerns delay purchases.

patterns.name: March Financial Year-End Push
patterns.description: Dealers and corporates rush purchases before financial year-end (March 31). Depreciation benefits drive fleet sales.

patterns.name: New Model Launch Spike
patterns.description: One-time demand spike from a new model/facelift launch.

patterns.name: Month-End Wholesale Push
patterns.description: Dealers push dispatches in last week of month to meet monthly targets.
